word: H8205 - שְׁפִי - shᵉphîy - shef-ee' - High place

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפי

Transliteration: shephı̂y

Phonetic: shef-ee'

BDB Definition:

  1. bareness, smooth or bare height, bare place, high places, barren height
    1. bareness
    2. bare place, bare height

Origin: from H8192

TWOT entry: 2440b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
